security_deposit.special_rules_local_overrides_note: Local ordinances and special housing programs can add stricter rules.

eviction.nonpayment_notice_type: (a) Nonpayment of rent – notice per RCW 59.12.030 (14-day Pay or Vacate);
eviction.lease_violation_notice_type: (n) Four or more lease violations in 12 months (each previously cured) – at least 60 days;
eviction.service_of_process_rule: (6) All notices must: be served per RCW 59.12.040; specify the facts supporting the just cause.

landlord_entry.allowed_entry_reasons_rule: (c) To inspect the premises, make necessary or agreed repairs, alterations or improvements, supply agreed services, or exhibit the dwelling unit to prospective tenants, purchasers, mortgagees, workmen, contractors, or real estate agents: providing that the landlord shall give the tenant at least 2 DAYS' prior notice of the landlord's intent to enter and entry shall occur only at reasonable times during normal business hours, unless the tenant otherwise agrees; (c) To inspect the premises, make necessary or agreed repairs, alterations or improvements, supply agreed services, or exhibit the dwelling unit to prospective tenants, purchasers, mortgagees, workmen, contractors, or real estate agents: providing that the landlord shall give the tenant at least 2 DAYS' prior notice of the landlord's intent to enter and entry shall occur only at reasonable times during normal business hours, unless the tenant otherwise agrees;
landlord_entry.entry_time_window_rule: (c) To inspect the premises, make necessary or agreed repairs, alterations or improvements, supply agreed services, or exhibit the dwelling unit to prospective tenants, purchasers, mortgagees, workmen, contractors, or real estate agents: providing that the landlord shall give the tenant at least 2 DAYS' prior notice of the landlord's intent to enter and entry shall occur only at reasonable times during normal business hours, unless the tenant otherwise agrees;
landlord_entry.penalty_for_illegal_entry_rule: Varies — confirm remedies (injunction, damages, attorney fees) under state law.

rent_increase.cap_rule: No statewide rent control; local rules may apply.
rent_increase.fixed_term_increase_allowed_rule: Varies — confirm your lease terms and statute.
rent_increase.month_to_month_increase_allowed_rule: Varies — generally allowed with proper notice.
rent_increase.delivery_method_rule: Varies — confirm written notice and delivery method requirements.
rent_increase.retaliation_protection_note: Retaliation protections may limit rent increases after protected tenant complaints; confirm local/state rules.

habitability.landlord_repair_duty_rule: (1) Comply with applicable building, housing, and health codes, especially when conditions endanger or impair the health or safety of the tenant;
habitability.tenant_notice_required_rule: Repair timelines (RCW 59.18.070): After tenant's written notice of deficiency:
habitability.tenant_termination_for_unrepaired_condit: Varies — some states allow termination after notice and failure to repair.
habitability.code_enforcement_contact_rule: Varies — contact local housing/code enforcement (city/county) for inspections and official repair orders.

sources.title: RCW 59.18.280 (Refund of deposits)
